archimate:Representation.name: SKOS
archimate:Representation.documentation:
Description: SKOS plays a crucial role in improving information retrieval, data integration, and semantic interoperability, as it provides a standardized approach to representing and exchanging knowledge. By utilizing SKOS, businesses can enhance the discoverability and accessibility of their knowledge resources, leading to more effective search, navigation, and analysis of information within their systems and applications.
Publisher: W3C
Source: https://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/
LOST view: SV-Functional Architecture Principles
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/egovera/SKOSRepresentation
EIRA concept: eira:SolutionBuildingBlock
Last modification: 2024-01-28
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/egovera/SKOSRepresentation
Interoperability Layer: Semantic
Realises: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/DataRepresentation

properties.value: SKOS plays a crucial role in improving information retrieval, data integration, and semantic interoperability, as it provides a standardized approach to representing and exchanging knowledge. By utilizing SKOS, businesses can enhance the discoverability and accessibility of their knowledge resources, leading to more effective search, navigation, and analysis of information within their systems and applications.
